title: The Potion to the Little Hotel House
summary: Seeker the dwarf and Uncle Grisco the mole embark on an interdimensional journey after discovering a magical potion closet. Choosing a draught that leads to the human world, they find themselves in the bedroom of a girl named Izzy. The travelers are given an enthusiastic tour of a house that feels like a little hotel, filled with treasures like a blue starry rug, a new baby, and a mouse named Ralph who lives in a book.

highlightQuote.text: Izzy's house is like a little hotel where Ralph lives. Ralph is a mouse in a book.

transcript.text: Brows and Prories.
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: Brows and Prories.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: Do you mean Stars and Stories?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No, I mean Stars and Stories.
Oh, Stars and Stories.
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: On that side they stayed, and on that side they fade, and over there and in the middle they don't fade, and over there and over there and over there they don't fade.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: That's a good observation. And I think the reason why is that the light on my phone mostly shines its light up and it is less bright shining to the sides, and so that's why the stars fade because they're less bright on the sides.
Ready for Stars and Stories? Did you want to have a blanket?
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: I want a Stars and Stories story about Uncle Grisco and Seeker. You'll be telling those parts, I'll be telling the mama and nana parts because they're moles, they'll join in at the end. So you'll tell the first part.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: Okay. Well, once upon a time Seeker and Uncle Grisco were at Uncle Grisco's house where Seeker had just found out that Uncle Grisco has his own potion closet. And Seeker asked Uncle Grisco, 'Now could you tell me about what kind of potions you have again?' And what did Uncle Grisco say?
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: Well and Uncle Grisco said, there's a tickle-too-soup-to-cloud and the purple soup potions and there was one that would take us to the Diamond World, one that would take us to the Rainbow Forest, one that would take us to Barbie's Garden, and there would be one that would take us to Izzy's house.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: Izzy's house, says Seeker. Who's Izzy?
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: Izzy's a person.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: A person? My my, I don't think I've ever met a person. I'm a dwarf and I've met lots of other dwarfs, and I've met moles like you Uncle Grisco and the mole family of course, and a few other kind of creatures like mice and bunnies. What are people like?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: People have hair, ears, eyes, nose, mouth, body, belly button, nipples, and sometimes a piece like toes, feet, and one of them whose name is Izzy got some skin off when she was climbing on her toes while she was peeing.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: I see, said Seeker. That's very interesting.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: She really likes to hug her cat Silver, and Mama likes to hug Finn.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And what is Izzy's house like, says Seeker?
Izzy's house is like a little hotel where Ralph lives. Ralph is a mouse in a book.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: I see. And what does Izzy's house have in it?
And also there's toys and books and a humidifier and lotion and things and pictures and they go on neighbor walks and they have a new baby named Avery and Yo-Yo and her heart.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: My my, that all sounds very interesting, said Seeker. I would love to go there. Shall we take the Izzy's house potion and go on an adventure to Izzy's house?
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: Yes siree!
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: And so Seeker and Uncle Grisco both had a sip and then they said the rhyme: Ruby Dooby Galoob, Ruby Dooby Galoob, Ruby Dooby Galoob. And then there was a floop and then poof, they appeared right in the middle of the blue starry rug in Isabella's bedroom. And Seeker—
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: And Isabella, and can I pretend to show Seeker around?
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: Yes, of course.
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: Seeker, this is my bed, this is my basket, this is my lamp, this is my door, this is my closet, and inside there's a dresser.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: Wow, says Seeker, there's so many things for me to learn about.
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: A chair and some books and a Yo-Yo charging and a lamp and lotion and an owl and pictures and a lion stone and a drawing pad, and that's all.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: What a wonderful house you have, Izzy the person.

And downstairs there's a sunroom with bins, a kitchen with cooking projects, a living room with toys, a dining room with tables and chairs, a book area with a surprise chair and books. Those are all the rooms downstairs. They have a playhouse and a climbing gym and a water table outside. Mostly I have trapeze and swings.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: And Seeker says, wow, what a wonderful house you've got. And do you have a family who lives here?

Yes, yes. I have a Dad and a kitty and Silver and Finn and Avery and my Mom and Nana and Papa and um, and um, and Julie Anne and um, the last person is my favorite people who are like Fiona and Miss Lynn, Miss Emily, and Miss Maryanne who are at school.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: Wonderful, said Seeker. Those are all the people who I have. Thank you for telling me all about your house and your family and all the people. And I think that we should go on an adventure in Izzy's house, said Seeker. But that is all the time we have for tonight's Stars and Story, so we'll have to continue another time.
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: So we can meet up again after nap, after you have breakfast, and I'll show you who's Mom and who's Dad and who's Avery and who's my cats.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: Good idea. And that's the end of Stars and Stories.
transcript.speaker: Dad

characters.name: Seeker
characters.description: A brave dwarven explorer and mediator, he resides in a glowing castle hub—a multiversal dock for skyships anchored within the skyline of New York City. From this urban sanctum, he conducts silver slime experiments and tends to wandering cats amidst a massive library. Frequently swapping between a red coat and a mystical purple cloak, his braided red beard remains his most eccentric tool, capable of catching small fish. A master of fusion, he combines ancient stone-craft with high-velocity mechanics, utilizing a legendary magic ladder to scale the shifting architecture of the realms. Whether brewing portal potions, harvesting floof-berries in Limbo with gemstone goggles, or aiding Buddy the Mouse, this walnut-loving student of the stars remains the hero who orchestrated the daring rescue of the world.

characters.name: Uncle Grisco
characters.description: A nomadic mole scientist and science teacher, this subterranean inventor resides in a home brimming with wondrous experiments, serving as a devoted confidant to the gopher folk. Within his laboratory of glowing elixirs and prismatic shadows, he fuses volcanic lore with the study of light to translate the planet's restless movements and the scarred history of cosmic craters. A wandering sage who maps both deep tectonic veins and celestial paths, he frequently emerges from his sprawling tunnels to share ancient botanical secrets and astronomical insights with his friend Seeker.

characters.name: Isabella
characters.description: A towering Dimatar scholar and alchemist of Atsukeeseet, Mama Izzy is a clever kiddo at heart and a steadfast guardian of rooftop gardens and intricate dollhouses. Gifted with the power of flight, she navigates the open heights with aquatic grace, her massive frame often shielded by a special protective metal that glimmers even as she descends into the shadows. As a resourceful quartermaster, she employs red flashlights, gold-laced slimes, and pipe cleaners to mend a Lanternshark’s failing light, yet her generosity remains her hallmark; she freely shares her vast library, brokers homes for dragons, and teaches others to find the resonance in their own voices. Her most profound magic resides in her vast, soft blanket—a sanctuary of ultimate coziness—where she remains a brave, quick-witted protector to all who honor her singular request for absolute silence.

characters.name: Mama
characters.description: Pistis Mouse’s mother, the architect of the naming that defined her daughter, is a maternal mole who slips away to the store by day and is currently away at the hospital. She remains the quiet destination at the journey’s end: a presence anchored to an upstairs chair, waiting to beckon her kitten into the velvet warmth of her lap for a soft, lingering embrace.

characters.name: Nana
characters.description: The dignified mole matriarch and grandmother to Hattie, Pistis, and Isabella, this pillar of watchful wisdom resides at the end of the train line, tackling life’s problems "one at a time." From engineering mouse-scale Lego structures to the meticulous restoration of dollhouses using patient glue and tiny pencils, her steady paws bridge the gap between architectural feats and delicate artistry. Whether discerning potential as a trolley passenger or welcoming weary travelers into her sanctuary, her quiet authority is so legendary that she graces the cover of Hattie’s book in a rare, peaceful slumber. Even in rest, she remains the heart of their world—a steady warmth anchoring every journey’s end, her sharp eyes softening for Izzy’s mushroom-textured crafts.

characters.name: Silver
characters.description: Immortalized in the stone of the Great Library yet reborn in Cat World as a small, hungry kitten, Izzy is a brave companion who now traverses the heart of Limbo. Communicating through an ancient, rhythmic language of resonant purrs and wielding a masterfully handled magical can opener, this tiny spirit balances her arcane legacy with a newfound, desperately urgent need for snuggles.

characters.name: Finn
characters.description: A resident of Cat World and loyal companion to Mama, Finncat is a meticulous research collector who documents the world through investigative sniffing. Alongside their peer Silver, they navigate their domain with scholarly curiosity, often pausing mid-voyage for a sudden, dramatic flop. While currently thwarted by the formidable challenge of an unopened food can, this diligent scholar occasionally graces the room for a fleeting minute during storytelling, lending a brief, discerning presence to the narrative before returning to their investigations.

characters.name: Ralph
characters.description: A mouse character who lives within the pages of a book.

characters.name: Avery
characters.description: Now christened [Name], this diminutive mole is the newest addition to Izzy’s family and Hattie’s velvety baby sister. A tiny voyager often depicted in portraits wearing oversized clothes, she is a slumbering resident aboard the ship, finding bliss in milk-filled dreams within her cozy "house" upon the storyteller’s knee. To protect [Name]’s fragile rest, the crew maintains a state of hushed reverence, ensuring the vessel remains a quiet sanctuary for its smallest, most loyal passenger.

characters.name: Yo-Yo
characters.description: A character mentioned as having a heart and needing charging.

characters.name: Papa
characters.description: A fixture of Izzy’s household and a steadfast confidant, this family member possesses a mender’s spirit, recently evidenced by the meticulous patience they used to glue a shattered art kit back together.

characters.name: Julie Anne
characters.description: A person mentioned as being part of Izzy's community.

characters.name: Fiona
characters.description: A friend of Izzy's from school.

characters.name: Miss Lynn
characters.description: One of the teachers at Izzy's school.

characters.name: Miss Emily
characters.description: A teacher at school mentioned by Izzy.

characters.name: Miss Maryanne
characters.description: A teacher at school mentioned by Izzy.

places.name: Uncle Grisco's House
places.description: Uncle Grisco’s subterranean home is a sprawling burrow and sophisticated laboratory where local moles frequently congregate. Within these earthen walls, cozy domesticity meets the hum of progress, as tangled roots frame glowing vials and intricate machinery dedicated to clandestine experiments and scientific discovery.

places.name: The Potion Closet
places.description: A magical storage area containing various brews, including one that leads to the human world.

places.name: Diamond World
places.description: A fantastical destination mentioned as one of the potion possibilities.

places.name: Rainbow Forest
places.description: Once charted by the Seeker and reachable only via the alchemical potency of Uncle Grisco’s potions, this kaleidoscopic forest is partitioned into radiant domains of red, orange, and gold. Beneath shifting, vibrant canopies, travelers navigate these distinct chromatic sections in search of the magical creatures lost within its shimmering depths.

places.name: Barbie's Garden
places.description: An enchanted garden mentioned by Uncle Grisco.

places.name: Izzy's House
places.description: Once the silent harbor of Jinjar’s return and the site of Rizzo and Izzy’s fateful council, this fortified sanctuary now serves as the primary destination reachable via a magical potion. Anchoring the company against the encroaching storm, the hallowed dwelling resembles a quaint hotel of labyrinthine rooms, featuring a celestial starry rug that blankets the ground where heroes once prepared for their departure to the dragon’s castle.

places.name: Sunroom
places.description: Nested in the depths of Izzy’s lower floor, a room crowded with a labyrinth of storage bins serves as the sanctuary for the rainbow snake, its iridescent scales casting a prismatic glow across the mundane clutter.

places.name: Isabella's Bedroom
places.description: The landing spot is a hushed, shadow-drenched room where a blue starry rug lies buried beneath a landscape of forgotten toys. In this quiet staging ground, the search party assembles, steeling themselves before plunging into the dark frontier under the bed.
